items.name: Midnight Flow Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🖤 Elegant • Dramatic • Timeless
This coat drapes like a story — a flowing black silhouette that feels both mysterious and graceful. Its long cut moves naturally, almost like it’s alive with every step, while the subtle worn edges give it depth and character. Sleek leather-like textures add a modern touch, making it perfect for avatars who want to stand out with quiet confidence.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Long, flowing design for dramatic movement
✨ PBR textures that give the fabric a realistic sheen
🧵 Detailed stitching & natural folds for authenticity
🌌 A look that works for fantasy, urban, or cinematic roleplay
🎮 Versatile style — cool, mysterious, but never harsh
🔍 Keywords: black coat, long trench coat, cinematic outfit, stylish fashion, mysterious robe, Roblox

items.name: Velvet Nocturne Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🌘 Old-world nobility in twilight tones.
This dark red coat with black satin lapels and ornate cuffs captures the elegance of gothic romance. It commands presence — neither mortal nor mundane.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant blend of crimson velvet and dark trim
Flared cuffs for theatrical movement
Great for nobles, vampires, or bards
PBR textures highlight velvet softness and sheen
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, black, velvet, gothic, vampire, noble, elegant, formal, PBR
Style eternal — born under moonlight.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: 👑「Imperial Radiance Coat [PBR]」
items.description:
Step into elegance and authority with this white and gold coat dress. Flowing sleeves, intricate golden trim, and a noble silhouette make it ideal for avatars who embody leadership, purity, and power. A garment that radiates both grace and strength.
✨ Features
Snow-white fabric with luxurious golden edges
Long, flowing sleeves for a majestic presence
Noble coat design with refined tailoring
PBR detailing for a glowing, high-quality finish
🔍 Keywords: royal, elegant, noble, gold-trimmed, majestic

items.name: Crimson Warden Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Dignity meets quiet menace.
A long burgundy coat lined with dark lapels, flowing elegantly like a mantle of command. It embodies restrained power — ideal for disciplined warriors or dark nobles.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Sleek, flowing cut with commanding presence
Deep crimson tones for gothic or fantasy use
Suitable for mage, noble, or guardian avatars
PBR finish enhances subtle fabric gradients
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, long, gothic, elegant, warden, formal, noble, fantasy, PBR
Walk with order — rule with calm.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: Ivory Ronin Coat [PBR]
items.description:
✨⚔️ Pure elegance with a warrior’s soul.
This refined ivory coat blends ceremonial beauty with a battle-ready silhouette. Soft off-white fabric is accented by muted gold trims and layered folds, while the tied belt and blade detail add a subtle ronin-inspired edge—perfect for noble fighters, sages, or elite NPCs.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant ivory color with gold-accent detailing
Flowing layered design that looks natural in motion
Balanced mix of ceremonial, fantasy, and samurai aesthetics
Ideal for roleplay, RPG worlds, and premium avatar outfits
🔍 Keywords: robe, ronin coat, samurai outfit, fantasy clothing, ivory robe, warrior outfit, elegant coat, rpg outfit, anime style, roblox clothes
Graceful, powerful, and timeless—this piece elevates any avatar instantly.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: Ballin' 67 Oversized Basketball Shirt
items.description:
Imagine how cool it would be to show up for a basketball game with a jersey with the number 67.

Well, now you can! Plus, it has lots of other cool halftone designs, including a basketball and text.

If you want a cool chain with a big 67 medallion on it, get the Big Gold 67 Chain here:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/103020408733598

This shirt is designed as a "dress" item. Therefore, it will layer under the 67 chain. These two clothing items will work well together.
